name: 格洛克18型 | 巅峰状态
nameZh: 格洛克18型 | 巅峰状态
descriptionEn: The Glock 18 is a serviceable first-round pistol that works best against unarmored opponents and is capable of firing three-round bursts. It has been custom painted using neon colors and metallic glitter paint. It's a bit much for me, but I'm not the target audience... - Booth, Arms Dealer
descriptionZh: 格洛克18型是把耐用的第一回合手枪，非常适合对付那些没有穿护甲的对手，并且可以进行三连发爆炸开火。 采用霓虹色与金属闪光漆手工涂装。 对我来说有点太花哨了，但我又不是目标客户……- 军火商布兹
